issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path examples.
The skill is specific to the CrewAI framework and may not work with other AI agent frameworks.

scenarios.name: custom-tool-crew-report
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B omits the required args_schema, context passing, and crew memory setting.

scenarios.name: hierarchical-report-crew
scenarios.rationale: Response B better satisfies the rubric by including memory=True, auto‑created manager, and explicit task delegation, whereas Response A lacks memory, uses an explicit manager, and does not clearly delegate tasks.
